/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -flto=auto -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,-soname,libwavetaskplugin.so -o ../bin/libwavetaskplugin.so CMakeFiles/wavetask.dir/wavetask_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavetask.dir/plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavetask.dir/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavetask.dir/smartlauncherbackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavetask.dir/smartlauncheritem.cpp.o
